no: Install before MiH Spell Pack and Table of Forms. Avoid combining SM + MiH SP + ToF together. Bardic Wonders can update SM's bard kit if installed after.

conflicts.reason: SCS Improved Shade Lord and Shadow Magic's Enhanced Shade Lord both modify the same encounter. Use SM's ability-only option (#8) if using SCS.

in.t: Pre-copy shadowadept/no_overwrite/MEWI*.txt files to game override/ directory before installing resource cost components (cn:1-4). These files are needed by ClassSpellTool and may be missing if cn:0 is rolled back. Or use eet-mod-forge-patches #20.

new: Enter shadow plane for fast travel.

ki.description: Shadow Magic is incompatible with Infinity UI++. Shadow Magic uses ClassSpellTool to register custom UI elements that Infinity UI++ cannot render.
ki.workaround: Choose one: either Infinity UI++ or Shadow Magic. If using Shadow Magic, use LeUI instead.

passive.desc: Permanent infravision and immunity to blindness
Fists drain 1 HP/hit (lv1-9), 2 HP + STR drain (lv10-19), 3 HP + STR drain + 20% level drain (lv20+)

activated.effects: Pick-one-of-four: Shadow Missile, Blinding Darkness, Shadow Veil, Decoy.
Pick-one-of-four: Dark Mirage, Black Mist, Ghostly Visage, Shadow Walk.
Pick-one-of-four: Shadowblast, Lifedrinker Touch, Shadow Comets, Impose.
Pick-one-of-four: Fireshield (Shadow), Shadeskin, Summon Shadow, Shar's Blessing.
Step into Shadow Plane for 7 seconds.
Teleport to target, turn invisible 1 round, next attack is guaranteed crit + drains 6 levels.

restrictions.alignment: TN, NE, CN, CE only (non-lawful, non-good)
restrictions.items: No Stunning Blow. No Quivering Palm. No Lay on Hands. Shadowdancer HLAs instead of fighter HLAs (no Use Any Item). Hit Die: d6 (vs monk d8). Requires DEX 14, WIS 9.

hlaPool.note: Uses shadowdancer HLA table (not monk) per research. No Use Any Item.

statBonus.note: Innate stat modifiers: +1 DEX, -1 STR, -4 CON

new: Monk wielding shadow magic. Shadow Step, blindness, and dark ki abilities.

sum: Adds a Shadow Magic spell school with 9 new spells for arcane casters. Shadow-themed abilities like shadow conjuration and shadow evocation.

co.no: Core shadow magic system. Required for all other components

co.n: Resource Costs: Drain Constitution on Cast
co.no: CON cost is harsh, but fun! Put those CON drain spells to use.

co.n: Resource Costs: Drain Maximum Hit Points on Cast
co.tp2n: Drain Maximum Hit Points on Cast
co.no: Drain max HP as resource cost — permanent until rest

co.n: Resource Costs: Drain Current Hit Points on Cast
co.tp2n: Drain Current Hit Points on Cast
co.no: HARD FAIL: 'MEWI4.TXT not found in KEY file'. Root cause: Transitions cn:0 triggers cascade uninstall of EndlessBG1, which temporarily removes Out Brief Candlekeep — the mod that initializes ClassSpellTool. On reinstall, MEWI1.txt is restored from backup so ClassSpellTool skips initialization, leaving MEWI4-9 missing. WORKAROUND: manually copy all MEWI*.txt and MEPR*.txt from any ClassSpellTool mod's no_overwrite/ folder into override before installing Shadow Magic. Or use cn:1 (Drain Constitution) or cn:4 (No Cost) which don't use ClassSpellTool.
No cost — shadow magic becomes free. Overpowered?

co.n: Shadow Magic: Shadow Monk monk kit
co.tp2n: Shadow Magic: Shadow Monk monk kit
co.no: New monk kit using shadow magic abilities

co.n: Enhanced Shade Lord: Hardcore (up to 9th level spells)
co.tp2n: Hardcore Difficulty: Casts up to 9th level spells
co.no: Hardcore Shade Lord with 9th level spells. INCOMPATIBLE with SCS Improved Shade Lord — both replace the Shade Lord entirely. Use cn:8 instead for SCS compatibility.

co.n: Enhanced Shade Lord: Standard (up to 7th level spells)
co.tp2n: Standard Difficulty: Casts up to 7th level spells
co.no: Standard Shade Lord with 7th level spells. INCOMPATIBLE with SCS Improved Shade Lord — use cn:8 instead.

co.n: Enhanced Shade Lord: Add Bonus Special Ability Only
co.no: Minimal Shade Lord enhancement — adds a shadow special ability. COMPATIBLE with SCS Improved Shade Lord: Shadow Magic COPYs enhanced CRE first (SPELL MODS), then SCS patches it with AI improvements (TACTICAL MODS). Install order is correct by category.

advisories.reason: NOT a real conflict. Shadow Magic cn:0 is empty prerequisite. Shadow Magic creatures (shadel.cre) outside MiH scope.
